name: pangu
description: Write CJK text with paranoid text spacing (盤古之白)

interface.shortDescription: Paranoid text spacing (盤古之白) for CJK-mixed writing
interface.longDescription: Insert a space between CJK (Chinese / Japanese / Korean) characters and adjacent half-width letters, numbers, and symbols in any prose, documentation, comments, or commit messages the agent writes — mirroring pangu.js's spacingText() while preserving code, URLs, file paths, and compound identifiers.
defaultPrompt: 幫我檢查這段中英混排的文字，補上缺少的盤古之白。
之後產生中文內容時，都套用盤古之白的空格規則。
